document.summary: The PCOS Awareness Association aims to raise awareness of Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS) and assist those diagnosed with this condition through educational services.

claims.claim_text: The PCOS Awareness Association raises global awareness of PCOS.
claims.evidence_text: Our mission at the PCOS Awareness Association is to raise global awareness of Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS).

claims.claim_text: The organization provides educational services to those affected by PCOS.
claims.evidence_text: We strive to break down barriers and offer educational services with the help of our dedicated volunteers.

entities.name: PCOS Awareness Association
entities.description: A non-profit organization focused on raising awareness and providing support for individuals affected by PCOS.
entities.evidence_text: Our mission at the PCOS Awareness Association is to raise global awareness of Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS).

citations.title: None
citations.evidence_text: Our mission at the PCOS Awareness Association is to raise global awareness of Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS).

evidence_snippets.text: We aim to empower people with the knowledge needed to take charge of their well-being and combat the health complications associated with this disorder.
evidence_snippets.relevance: This snippet highlights the organization's goal to empower individuals affected by PCOS.

source_credibility.reason: The organization is a dedicated non-profit focused on health awareness.
